auth

Auth dev API (Iron Rule 8, ADR-0005).

public exports — the entire dev API

consumer in app routes

Generated from app/_features/auth/index.ts by npm run docs:surfaces — the code is the source of truth.

Dev API

What outsiders may import from @/app/_features/auth. Everything else in the folder is private (boundary rule D).

ExportKindSource module
LoginFormcomponent./LoginForm
signOutActionserver action./actions

Used by
